scripts.build:testing: esbuild testing/main.tsx --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --jsx=automatic --minify --outfile=testing/testing.js && mkdir -p public/testing Testing && cp testing/index.html public/testing/index.html && cp testing/index.html Testing/index.html && cp testing/testing.js public/testing/testing.js && cp testing/testing.js Testing/testing.js && cp testing/testing.css public/testing/testing.css && cp testing/testing.css Testing/testing.css
